body_html:
Hi Rosa,

Happy to walk you through it. For your 21st birthday on 6/6 with around 30 guests, here's the quick framework:

We offer a few service styles — buffet, drop-off, and full-service with our team on-site. Pricing scales by guest count, menu, and service style, so to give you a tight number rather than a ballpark, two quick questions back:

1. Is 30 guests still the plan, or has the count shifted?
2. Are you leaning toward buffet/drop-off, or full-service with our team on-site?

Once I have those, I'll send exact pricing and menu options. If you'd rather see and taste before deciding, we can also set up a quick tasting.

— André
